rationale: Gov't Code §2306.1111 governs uniform application and funding cycles for competitive housing programs. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts.
quote: the department shall establish uniform application and funding cycles for all competitive single-family and multifamily housing programs administered by the department under this chapter
_note: No conflict; the cited rule addresses TDHCA housing program cycles, not property tax homestead exemptions.
